description: Style Noteasics, an acronym derived from the Latin phrase, 'Anima Sana In Corpore Sano' - a sound mind in a sound body, creates products for the harmony of body and soul. This lightweight shoe, the SUMIYAKA, is a modern-day take on the classic running sneaker and caters to the style-conscious consumers. Product DetailsSynthetic leather and fibre upper in black and white with a unique toe overlaySheet EVA midsole and cushion holes at the rear for improved flexibility and cushioningRubber outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
